'''layuzhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:iatroastrology|iatroastrology]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-y-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:iatroastrology|iatroastrology]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| layuzhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:læyizhith|læyizhith]] || [[word:læyizhij|læyizhij]] || [[word:læyizhish|læyizhish]] || [[word:læyizhi|læyizhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:layuyuzhuth|layuyuzhuth]] || [[word:layuyuzhuj|layuyuzhuj]] || [[word:layuyuzhush|layuyuzhush]] || [[word:layuyuzhu|layuyuzhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:layuzhuth|layuzhuth]] || [[word:layuzhuj|layuzhuj]] || [[word:layuzhush|layuzhush]] || [[word:layuzhu|layuzhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:layufzhuth|layufzhuth]] || [[word:layufzhuj|layufzhuj]] || [[word:layufzhush|layufzhush]] || [[word:layufzhuf|layufzhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:layuzhuthu|layuzhuthu]] || [[word:layuzhuju|layuzhuju]] || [[word:layuzhushu|layuzhushu]] || [[word:layuzhuku|layuzhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:layuzhuth|layuzhuth]] || [[word:layuzhuj|layuzhuj]] || [[word:layuzhush|layuzhush]] || [[word:layuzhu|layuzhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:layuzhuthul|layuzhuthul]] || [[word:layuzhujul|layuzhujul]] || [[word:layuzhushul|layuzhushul]] || [[word:layuzhukul|layuzhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:layuzhuthuthu|layuzhuthuthu]] || [[word:layuzhujuju|layuzhujuju]] || [[word:layuzhushushu|layuzhushushu]] || [[word:layuzhuku|layuzhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:layuzhuthun|layuzhuthun]] || [[word:layuzhujun|layuzhujun]] || [[word:layuzhushun|layuzhushun]] || [[word:layuzhukun|layuzhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:layuzhuthuoro|layuzhuthuoro]] || [[word:layuzhujuoro|layuzhujuoro]] || [[word:layuzhushuoro|layuzhushuoro]] || [[word:layuzhukuoro|layuzhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c4abda}}
